## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff sync for the Yourco and Discern accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Yourco:** Immediately adopt the agentic pipeline in the `test` workspace. Pamela will run next week's articles, log all post-processing, and file weekly tickets to automate the most time-consuming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**Discern:** The core issue of articles being "shoehorned" into the wrong format is due to using the wrong PSEO pipeline for a given topic cluster. The solution is creating a new, specific pipeline for each cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [**Discern:** To accelerate the manual pipeline, Ademilade will request an EPD fix to automate all steps except the final publish. This will serve as a model for future pipeline improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [**Discern:** Staging is a manual process managed via a recurring Linear ticket assigned to Suleiman. Pamela will move articles to `Ready for Staging`, add a `new article` tag, and notify Suleiman in the weekly thread.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

## Topics

### Discern: PSEO Pipeline Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Articles are being "shoehorned" into the wrong format (e.g., a general listicle forced into a competitor-alternative structure).](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [**Cause:** Using the wrong PSEO pipeline for a given topic cluster. Each cluster requires a specific pipeline to generate the correct structure.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a new PSEO pipeline for each new topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=2271.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
        1.  [**Create Artifacts:** A `Template` (Rule) and a `Sample Article` (Other) are required.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
        2.  [**Generate Template:** Use Claude to create a template based on SERP research and the cluster's specific article type.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=3381.0)
        3.  [**Create Sample:** Write a high-quality sample article that adheres to the template.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=3758.0)
        4.  [**Build Pipeline:** Copy an existing PSEO pipeline and use find-and-replace to update all references to the old template and sample with the new ones.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=4506.0)
  - [**Action:** Pamela will file Linear tickets for new pipelines, providing the template and sample artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=4809.0)

### Discern: Workflow & Staging

  - [**Goal:** Automate the manual pipeline to improve efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [**Problem:** The current pipeline requires manual triggering of each step, which is slow.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [**Action:** Ademilade will request an EPD fix to automate all steps except the final publish.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [**Staging Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
      - [Move approved articles to `Ready for Staging` in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
      - [Add a `new article` tag to the card.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
      - [Notify Suleiman in the weekly Linear ticket thread.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
      - [Post a link to the ticket in the internal Slack channel for visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

### Yourco: Pipeline & Staging

  - [**Pipeline:** Immediately adopt the agentic pipeline in the `test` workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This aligns with the engine team's focus and provides a clear baseline for improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [**Action:** Pamela will run next week's articles, log all post-processing, and file weekly tickets to automate the most time-consuming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**Staging Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
      - [A manual process in Prismic, taking \~7-15 minutes per article.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [**Action:** Ademilade will find the old ticket or file a new one to automate this process.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### Handoff Logistics & Deadlines

  - [**Yourco:**](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
      - [**Deadline:** Deliver content by Wednesday for the following week's publication.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=5073.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Move articles to `Client Review`, then notify Carrie.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=5194.0)
  - [**Discern:**](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [**Deadline:** Deliver content by Friday for the current week's publication.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=5043.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Move articles to `Ready for Staging`, then notify Suleiman.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [**Workload:**](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
      - [**Yourco:** 6 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
      - [**Discern:** 26 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
  - [**Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=4375.0)
      - [**Yourco:** Kari is the primary contact for account-specific questions.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=4375.0)
      - [**Discern:** Vivek is the contact for client priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Pamela:**](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

      - [Move approved Discern articles to `Ready for Staging` and notify Suleiman.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
      - [Watch all handoff Loom videos.](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=4204.0)
  - [**Ademilade:**](https://fathom.video/share/_HzkcFn7fL3hoKTs5_8-7jM-kxyyJ1nW?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
